---
title: "周深9.29Hz十周年巡回演唱会Talking"
author: "低碳南"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
biblio-style: apalike
bibliography: reference.bib
link-citations: yes
description: "2024周深9.29Hz巡回演唱会Talking全程。"
cover-image: "img/book-cover.jpg"
favicon: "img/biaobiao.ico"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
set.seed(0728)

if (knitr::is_html_output()) {
  # ignore percentage widths for HTML output, unless they are used for multiple
  # figures side by side
  knitr::opts_hooks$set(out.width = function(options) {
    if (options$fig.show != 'hold' && grepl('%$', options$out.width))
      options$out.width = NULL
    options
  })
}

colorize <- function(x, color) {
  if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
    sprintf("\\textcolor{%s}{%s}", color, x)
  } else if (knitr::is_html_output()) {
    sprintf("<span style='color: %s;'>%s</span>", color,
      x)
  } else x
}
```


# 前言 {-}


[本书](https://929hz.com/)记录**周深9.29Hz十周年巡回演唱会**所有场次的现场Talking文字版，希望通过阅读这些文字，能唤起你演唱会的记忆。深深说过的话，也能成为我们的时光胶囊，承载我们快乐的记忆，能让我们记住很久很久！


```{r, echo=FALSE, out.width = "500px", fig.align='center'}
knitr::include_graphics(rep("img/book-cover.jpg"))
```



```{asis, echo=!knitr::is_latex_output()}
::: {.infobox .caution}
**注意!**

本整理稿在线版免费阅读，禁止商用!
:::

```


## 关于本书(WIP) {#motivation -}

> 只要你们想我的时候就可以打开那个文档。——周深

欢迎生米们阅读，如果你有任何疑问或者反馈，请 [提交反馈](https://github.com/ditannan/9.29Hz/issues/new)。谢谢

## 关于作者(WIP) {#about-author -}
### 低碳南 {-#author-name}

```{asis, echo=!knitr::is_latex_output()}
::: {.author-section}

:::{.author-text}
&emsp;&emsp;活跃于某红书，某红书昵称`我和老婆是生米`，被其妻影响而成为一名生米，因年纪不小，被戏称为米叔。
:::

::: {.author-image}
![](./img/pang-mi.png)
:::

:::

```

## 致谢(WIP) {#Acknowledgments -}
感谢
